title: Senior Full Stack Developer
description:
We are looking for a talented Senior Full Stack Developer to join our growing engineering team. You will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining web applications for our enterprise clients.

Responsibilities:
- Develop and maintain web applications using modern frameworks
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and ship new features
- Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code
- Participate in code reviews and technical discussions
- Mentor junior developers

Why join Sagara?
- Work on challenging enterprise-level projects
- Competitive salary and benefits
- Professional development opportunities
- Flexible working arrangements
requirements: 3+ years of experience with React or Vue.js
Strong experience with Node.js or Python

title: Cloud Architect
description:
We are seeking an experienced Cloud Architect to lead our cloud migration and optimization projects. You will design and implement cloud solutions for enterprise clients across various industries.

Responsibilities:
- Design cloud architecture for scalability and reliability
- Lead cloud migration projects
- Optimize cloud costs and performance
- Implement security best practices
- Mentor team members on cloud technologies

Why join Sagara?
- Work with latest cloud technologies
- Competitive compensation package
- Career growth opportunities
- Collaborative work environment
requirements: Strong understanding of security best practices

title: UI/UX Designer
description:
Join our design team to create beautiful and intuitive user interfaces for enterprise applications. You will work closely with developers and product managers to deliver exceptional user experiences.

Responsibilities:
- Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs
- Conduct user research and usability testing
- Collaborate with developers to implement designs
- Maintain design systems and guidelines
- Stay updated with design trends and best practices

Why join Sagara?
- Creative and collaborative environment
- Opportunity to work on diverse projects
- Professional growth and learning
- Competitive benefits package
requirements: Proficiency in Figma or Adobe XD
Knowledge of HTML/CSS is a plus

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description:
We are looking for a Cybersecurity Analyst to join our security team. You will be responsible for conducting security assessments, vulnerability testing, and implementing security measures for our clients.

Responsibilities:
- Conduct security audits and vulnerability assessments
- Perform penetration testing
- Implement security monitoring and incident response
- Stay updated with latest security threats
- Provide security recommendations to clients

Why join Sagara?
- Work with enterprise security challenges
- Continuous learning opportunities
- Competitive salary and benefits
- Supportive team environment
requirements: Security certification is a plus (CEH, CISSP)

title: Project Manager
description:
We are seeking an experienced Project Manager to lead software development projects for our enterprise clients. You will be responsible for project planning, execution, and delivery.

Responsibilities:
- Manage project timelines, budgets, and resources
- Coordinate with clients and internal teams
- Ensure project deliverables meet quality standards
- Identify and mitigate project risks
- Prepare project documentation and reports

Why join Sagara?
- Lead impactful enterprise projects
- Collaborative work culture
- Professional development support
- Competitive compensation package
requirements: 4+ years of IT project management experience
PMP or Scrum Master certification is a plus
Experience with Jira or similar tools

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
Join our DevOps team to build and maintain CI/CD pipelines, manage cloud infrastructure, and automate deployment processes for our clients.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement CI/CD pipelines
- Manage cloud infrastructure (AWS/Azure/GCP)
- Implement monitoring and alerting systems
- Automate deployment and scaling processes
- Ensure system reliability and performance

Why join Sagara?
- Work with modern DevOps tools
- Remote work flexibility
- Competitive salary and benefits
- Learning and growth opportunities
requirements: Experience with CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions)
